markets.question: Will Saudi Aramco complete a secondary IPO on Tadawul before December 31, 2026?
markets.description: Tracks whether Saudi Aramco will list additional shares on the Saudi stock exchange (Tadawul) in a secondary public offering before year-end 2026.
rules: Resolves YES if Tadawul confirms a secondary offering of any size before close time.
Resolves NO if no filing or confirmation is published by close time.
A private placement does not count as an IPO for this market.
markets.resolutionBasis: Official Tadawul filing or Saudi CMA announcement
resolutionExamples: YES if Aramco files a prospectus for secondary shares on Tadawul.
NO if no secondary offering occurs by December 31, 2026.

markets.question: Will the UAE rank in the top 3 of the Global AI Index by end of 2026?
markets.description: Evaluates whether the United Arab Emirates will achieve a top-3 ranking in the annual Global AI Index published by Tortoise Media.
rules: Resolves YES if the UAE is ranked 1st, 2nd, or 3rd in the Tortoise Global AI Index 2026 edition.
Resolves NO if the UAE is ranked 4th or lower.
If the index is not published in 2026, market resolves NO.
markets.resolutionBasis: Tortoise Media Global AI Index 2026 publication

markets.question: Will NEOM The Line complete Phase 1 construction milestones by Q4 2027?
markets.description: Tracks whether the NEOM megaproject in Saudi Arabia achieves its Phase 1 construction milestones, including initial residential and commercial structures within The Line.
markets.resolutionSource: NEOM official project updates and Saudi PIF reports
rules: Resolves YES if NEOM or the Saudi PIF confirms Phase 1 completion by Q4 2027.
Resolves NO if official reports indicate Phase 1 is incomplete or delayed past Q4 2027.
Partial completion does not satisfy this market.
markets.resolutionBasis: NEOM official announcements or PIF quarterly reports
resolutionExamples: YES if NEOM announces Phase 1 complete with residents moving in.
NO if construction delays push Phase 1 past December 2027.

markets.question: Will the Central Bank of Egypt cut interest rates in Q3 2026?
markets.description: Predicts whether the Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) will reduce its key overnight lending rate during Q3 2026 (July-September).
markets.resolutionSource: Central Bank of Egypt monetary policy decisions
rules: Resolves YES if the CBE reduces the overnight lending rate at any meeting in Q3 2026.
Resolves NO if rates remain unchanged or increase during Q3 2026.
Only the overnight lending rate is considered.
markets.resolutionBasis: Central Bank of Egypt press release after monetary policy meetings

markets.question: Will Qatar be selected to host the FIFA Club World Cup 2029?
markets.description: Tracks whether Qatar will be announced as the host nation for the expanded FIFA Club World Cup 2029 tournament.
rules: Resolves YES if FIFA officially announces Qatar as the 2029 Club World Cup host.
Resolves NO if FIFA selects another nation or the tournament is cancelled.
Co-hosting counts as YES only if Qatar is listed as a primary host.

markets.question: Will Morocco achieve GDP growth above 4% in 2026?
markets.description: Predicts whether Morocco's real GDP growth rate for the full year 2026 will exceed 4% as reported by the Haut-Commissariat au Plan.
markets.resolutionSource: Morocco Haut-Commissariat au Plan annual GDP report
rules: Resolves YES if the official 2026 GDP growth exceeds 4.0%.
Resolves NO if growth is 4.0% or below.
Only the HCP official annual figure is used, not preliminary estimates.
markets.resolutionBasis: Haut-Commissariat au Plan annual GDP publication

markets.question: Will the GCC announce a common currency framework by end of 2027?
markets.description: Tracks whether the Gulf Cooperation Council member states will jointly announce a formal framework or timeline for a common currency by December 31, 2027.
markets.resolutionSource: GCC Secretariat or member state central bank joint statements
rules: Resolves YES if GCC members jointly announce a common currency framework or binding timeline.
Resolves NO if no joint announcement is made by close time.
Informal discussions or non-binding communiques do not count.

markets.question: Will total Jordanian tech startup exits exceed USD 500M in 2026?
markets.description: Predicts whether the aggregate value of Jordanian tech startup acquisitions, IPOs, and secondary sales in 2026 will surpass 500 million USD.
markets.resolutionSource: MAGNiTT or Wamda Capital annual MENA startup reports
rules: Resolves YES if total reported exit value exceeds USD 500M.
Resolves NO if total is USD 500M or below.
Uses the first major industry report published after year-end (MAGNiTT or Wamda).
markets.resolutionBasis: MAGNiTT or Wamda annual MENA venture report
